gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.frameVersion, T1.name , IIF(T2.status = 'Banned', T1.name, 'NO') FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.artist = 'Allen Williams'

pred_sql: SELECT T1.frameVersion, T1.name, IIF(T2.status = 'Banned', T1.name, 'NO') FROM cards T1 LEFT JOIN legalities T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.artist = 'Allen Williams'
question: List all the frame styles and cards Allen Williams worked on and find any banned cards if there are any.
